scripts.verify:core: npm run lint --workspace app && npm run build --workspace app && npm run build --workspace viral-sync-sdk && cargo check --manifest-path programs/viral_sync/Cargo.toml && npm run build:program && npm run frontier:verify-artifacts && npm run auditor:packet && npm run frontier:assert-final && npm run test:protocol
scripts.frontier:verify-artifacts: npm run proof:publish-verifier && npm run merchant:passport && npm run fraud:gauntlet && npm run conversion:orderbook && npm run campaign:links && npm run merchant:validation && npm run proof:feed && npm run invariants && npm run proof:stamp && npm run frontier:readiness && npm run proof:stamp && npm run proof:schema:final && npm run frontier:submission
scripts.frontier:preflight: npm run frontier:offline-preflight && npm run build:program && npm run proof:program-id-check && npm run test:protocol:attack
scripts.frontier:final-core: npm run build:program && npm run proof:program-id-check:strict && anchor deploy --provider.cluster devnet && npm run devnet:causal-commerce:frontier-final && npm run devnet:verify-receipt -- --output tmp/devnet-causal-commerce-verifier.json && npm run frontier:verify-artifacts
scripts.frontier:final-existing-program: npm run proof:program-id-check:strict && node scripts/check-devnet-program-exists.mjs && npm run devnet:causal-commerce:frontier-final && npm run devnet:verify-receipt -- --output tmp/devnet-causal-commerce-verifier.json && npm run frontier:verify-artifacts
scripts.frontier:verify-submitted-artifacts: npm run proof:schema:final && npm run frontier:assert-final && npm run test:protocol
scripts.frontier:package: npm run frontier:assert-final && npm run test:protocol && node scripts/package-frontier-submission.mjs
scripts.frontier:final: npm run frontier:final-core:transcript && npm run auditor:packet && npm run frontier:assert-final
scripts.frontier:offline-preflight: npm run lint --workspace app && npm run build --workspace app && npm run build --workspace viral-sync-sdk && npm run proof:schema && npm run proof:program-id-check && npm run invariants && npm run frontier:readiness && npm run frontier:preproof-docs
